{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240937234C7B40AD471DDB2AF432"}"},"total":696},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7306063444054623011","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，有点古龙风格，继续加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701077126,"group_id":"7213045337714330661","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/FH9JUMAljZE6Vb5mn8j74=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"102184051479","user_name":"卧龙城的南云霞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102184051479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7213045337714330661","book_info":{"abstract":"【历史架空】+【权谋争霸】+【热血江湖】
江湖是一座烘炉，庙堂是阴诡的战场！
十八年前镇北侯叶昭战死火邪岭，十八年后叶千尘血洗长安城！
他从北境走出，一路浪荡颠簸！
奉旨入长安，他搅起阴诡风云；仗剑闯江湖，他留下无上威名！
征北蛮，战天下！庙堂之上他权倾朝野；江湖之中他武道称王！
……
火邪岭外，圣者无敌一枪摧万城；东晋边关，千里御剑大笑破帝都！
这是一个盛世也是一个乱世！天下英豪各展雄风，江湖儿女铁血柔肠。看狼烟，燃起千军万马；战天下，一眼万里江山！（此大秦，非彼大秦，若有类同纯属巧合。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cd7f3eced916a98e6d86c419b86e3a37","author":"秋莫寒","author_id":"","book_id":"7213045337714330661","book_name":"铁血镇北侯，开局从纨绔公子开始","book_short_name":"铁血镇北侯","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7213046432993903104","read_count":"49541","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4266035"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1772","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7277bf7aea35f30421f2d4f8cb368a86~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500243&x-signature=wpiuGDoOVkCSFPdg7cIGQzkzNtU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103877521715","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.38178116e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240937234C7B40AD471DDB2AF432"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":138177,"reply_c
